hero.title: Ensuring Data Sovereignty
hero.subtitle: Next-Gen Local Solutions
hero.description: LINGSSOFT creates a world where your data remains yours, without cloud dependency. Experience local-centric innovation combining powerful security and AI.

ai.title: ECO AI DevOps Appliance
ai.description: An on-premise specialized AI-driven DevOps solution promising sustainable energy efficiency and data security.

slides.label: ECO Resource Management
slides.title: A New Standard for Energy Efficiency
slides.description: Minimize power consumption and realize digital carbon neutrality with cutting-edge technology.

cards.title: Idle mode control algorithm
cards.description: Detects real-time usage to eliminate unnecessary power consumption and intelligently reallocates computing resources.

cards.title: Resource scheduling
cards.description: Allocates hardware resources optimized for workloads to reduce overhead and maximize operational cost savings.

cards.title: Process scheduling
cards.description: Effectively distributes system load to enhance processing performance and support low-carbon, sustainable business management.

slides.label: On-premise Innovation
slides.title: Perfect Security Environment
slides.description: Thoroughly manage corporate data internally to guarantee robust information sovereignty.

cards.title: Enhanced Security
cards.description: Establishes an air-gap environment isolated from external networks to fundamentally block all abnormal access and intrusion threats.

cards.title: Protection
cards.description: Provides powerful on-premise encryption and distribution control systems to prevent the leakage of core technologies and intellectual assets.

cards.title: Control
cards.description: Ensures transparent management and complete control over data usage by tracking and visualizing all internal data flows in real-time.

slides.label: AI-based DevOps
slides.title: Maximizing Development Productivity
slides.description: Helping developers focus on creativity by automating complex operations with AI.

cards.title: Automation
cards.description: Intelligent AI automates repetitive infrastructure setup and build processes, dramatically reducing pipeline construction time.

cards.title: Speed
cards.description: Simplifies complex procedures through optimized deployment strategies, accelerating the product's time-to-market.

cards.title: Quality
cards.description: Prevents errors proactively through AI-driven continuous monitoring and automated testing, ensuring service continuity and stability.

energy.title: Energy Efficiency - ECO Resource Management
energy.description: Utilizes cutting-edge ECO Resource Management technology to efficiently allocate computing resources and dramatically reduce power consumption. Optimizes infra costs and provides a sustainable digital environment.

sovereignty.title: Data Sovereignty - On-premise Environment
sovereignty.description: Completely control the flow of data within your organization. By fundamentally blocking any possibility of external leaks, we securely protect your most valuable asset—your data.

usability.title: DevOps Innovation - AI DevOps
usability.description: Innovates complex development pipelines and infrastructure configurations through AI-driven automation. We build an environment where developers can focus solely on creating core value.

items.title: Integrated Solution Supply
items.description: From field-ready hardware-integrated appliances to optimized software packages, we offer integrated supply solutions tailored to your enterprise size.

items.title: Delivering Sustainable Value
items.description: Lower the initial introduction burden through flexible subscription licenses and experience the latest AI technology that is continuously updated throughout its lifecycle.

items.title: Specialized Tech Partnership
items.description: Going beyond simple support, we accompany you on your successful digital transformation journey through custom implementations optimized for your environment and dedicated engineer consulting.

items.title: Trust-Based Market Value
items.description: We offer proven value in public and financial markets where security and trust are essential, positioning ourselves as the standard for next-generation local AI technology.

security.title: Enterprise Security Suite
security.description: From process monitoring to document security. Protect all corporate digital assets seamlessly. All logs and monitoring data remain safely isolated up within your organization.

education.title: EduTech Platform
education.description: A standalone online education system for freelance tutors. Own and manage student data and teaching materials directly without platform dependency.
